name: @swarm/layer
description: Lambda layer with native modules (sharp) and fetch shims for Node.js 20+

scripts.build:layer: rm -rf nodejs && mkdir -p nodejs && cp package.json nodejs/ && cd nodejs && npm install --omit=dev --platform=linux --arch=x64 && mkdir -p node_modules/node-fetch && cp ../node-fetch-shim/* node_modules/node-fetch/ && mkdir -p node_modules/abort-controller && cp ../abort-controller-shim/* node_modules/abort-controller/
